author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(hooks): allow additional widget properties to be passed from hooks (algolia/react-instantsearch#3359)
body:
* feat(hooks): allow widgetType to be passed to hooks

This gets used to distinguish between builtin components and user-defined components, which either have no widgetType or a user-defined one.

* make required in useConnector (but nullable)

* update test

* additional widget properties, not widgetType only
